outputs.description: The BitSight API returns first_seen timestamps in date-only format (YYYY-MM-DD) without hours or minutes. The integration converts these to full timestamps in the
outputs.name: API Date Format Limitation:

outputs.description: field for XSIAM compatibility. This means all events will show timestamps like 2025-08-30T00:00:00 (midnight UTC) regardless of when during that day the finding was actually discovered.
